Localization.Description: Web Filter allowed access to a web resource and displayed a warning or denied access to a web resource

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Web Filter denied access from host {src.host} to a web resource on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Web Filter allowed access from host {src.host} to a web resource with a warning on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
